name: Skopje
description: Explore the vibrant capital where ancient meets modern! Discover the iconic Stone Bridge and bustling Macedonia Square in this adventure hub.

name: Ohrid
description: Dive into history at this UNESCO World Heritage lakeside city! Ancient churches and crystal-clear waters await your exploration.

name: Bitola
description: Walk through the 'City of Consuls' with stunning Ottoman architecture and vibrant Shirok Sokak street life!

name: Tetovo
description: Marvel at the spectacular Painted Mosque and experience authentic northwestern Macedonian mountain culture!

name: Lake Ohrid
description: Plunge into one of Europe's oldest and deepest lakes! Crystal-clear waters and ancient mysteries await brave explorers.

name: Matka Canyon
description: Kayak through this dramatic canyon paradise just minutes from Skopje! Turquoise waters and towering cliffs create the ultimate adventure.

name: Zovichki Bridge / Movie Bridge
description: Cross the legendary bridge from famous Macedonian films! This cinematic icon offers breathtaking valley views that will leave you speechless.

name: Holy Transfiguration
description: Journey to this mystical hilltop sanctuary where ancient prayers echo through time! Marvel at centuries-old frescoes in absolute tranquility.

name: Gabrovo Waterfalls
description: Trek to these thundering cascades hidden deep in Macedonia's wilderness! Crystal-clear pools await brave adventurers who make the journey.

name: Koleshino Waterfall
description: Witness Macedonia's crown jewel of waterfalls! This towering cascade plunges through pristine wilderness - a true bucket-list adventure.

name: Smolare Waterfall
description: Conquer Macedonia's mightiest waterfall! At 39 meters, this roaring giant crashes down through ancient forest - pure adrenaline for adventurers.

name: Blatec Lake
description: Discover this pristine mountain lake sanctuary! Perfect for wild swimming, fishing, and connecting with Macedonia's untamed nature.

name: Todorovci Stonehenge
description: Uncover Macedonia's Stonehenge! These mysterious megalithic stones hold ancient secrets that will ignite your imagination and sense of wonder.

name: Monastery Saint Ana
description: Seek ancient wisdom at this sacred mountain monastery! Feel the spiritual energy that has drawn pilgrims here for centuries.

name: St. Gjorgjija Monastery
description: Experience spiritual heritage at this ancient monastery dedicated to Saint George, featuring magnificent Byzantine frescoes and architecture.

name: Lesnovo Monastery
description: Journey to this sacred Orthodox monastery famous for its 14th-century frescoes and profound religious heritage.

name: Monastery of St. Elias
description: Visit this sacred Orthodox monastery dedicated to Prophet Elijah, featuring beautiful religious art and peaceful mountain grounds.

name: Monastery Sveti Petar i Pavle
description: Discover this historic monastery dedicated to Saints Peter and Paul, showcasing magnificent Orthodox religious art and architecture.

name: Oreshe Waterfall
description: Chase this spectacular waterfall through rugged mountain terrain! The thunderous roar and mist-filled air will awaken your wild spirit.

name: Belovishki Waterfall
description: Marvel at this spectacular waterfall cascading down rocky cliffs, surrounded by pristine mountain forest and crystal-clear pools.

name: Waterfall Vera
description: Experience the natural beauty of Waterfall Vera, a hidden gem perfect for hiking and nature photography adventures.

name: Rosoki Springs
description: Refresh yourself at these crystal-clear natural springs, known for their pure mountain water and scenic wilderness surroundings.

name: Vevchanska Lokva
description: Enjoy this natural swimming pool paradise perfect for wild swimming and relaxation in a stunning mountain setting.

name: Smrdliva Voda
description: Visit these unique therapeutic mineral springs known for their healing properties and distinctive natural character.

name: Capari Vir
description: Experience this natural whirlpool formation, a unique geological phenomenon perfect for nature enthusiasts and photographers.

name: Ajdarova Livada
description: Relax in this beautiful mountain meadow paradise, perfect for picnics and enjoying pristine natural beauty.

name: Lake Paljurci
description: Enjoy this serene mountain lake perfect for fishing, swimming, and peaceful nature experiences away from the crowds.

name: Natural Beach
description: Relax at this pristine natural beach area, perfect for swimming and sunbathing in beautiful wild surroundings.

name: Malovishte
description: Step back in time in this authentic mountain village! Experience true Macedonian hospitality while surrounded by epic landscapes.

name: Zovich
description: Discover the soul of rural Macedonia in this hidden gem! Stone houses and dramatic mountain backdrops create the perfect adventure basecamp.

name: Ljubojno
description: Visit this historic lakeside town offering beautiful views of Lake Prespa and authentic Macedonian cultural heritage.

name: Trebishte
description: Discover this fascinating archaeological site with ancient remains and stunning lake views of Prespa.

name: Belojshki Biser Restaurant
description: Experience authentic Macedonian mountain cuisine at this renowned restaurant offering local specialties and incredible mountain atmosphere.

name: Ribnik Kapinovo & Nezilovski Merak
description: Enjoy recreational fishing and relaxation at this scenic lake area with traditional Macedonian hospitality and camping facilities.

name: Restaurant Na Valajci
description: Savor authentic Macedonian cuisine at this traditional mountain restaurant known for its specialties and warm hospitality.
